findings.issue: Blocker #15 falsely marked as 'ready to build' despite partial implementation in code
findings.recommended_fix: Update blocker status to '🟡 partial' and verify VC issuance flow. Investigate src/credentials/openbadges/vc-converter.ts and badge_issuer.issue_badge for compliance gaps.
